reviews.comment:
A veces hay mucha espera. En varias oportunidades me paso que no les funciona el Serví club de ypf, dicen que no tienen sistema.

(Translated by Google)
Sometimes there's a long wait. On several occasions, the YPF service station hasn't worked for me; they say their system is down.
